description_long: This object is a rectangular loaf of bread with a rich, dark brown crust on top and a golden-yellow, slightly porous body beneath. The top crust appears smooth and unscored, with a subtle, uneven edge where it meets the softer bread below. The sides and ends of the loaf display a spongy, aerated texture typical of well-baked bread, with small holes and a matte finish. The loaf is unsliced and maintains a uniform, block-like shape, suggesting it is a standard sandwich or pan loaf. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust. The object is unbranded and unwrapped, with no visible packaging or labeling.
description: A rectangular, unsliced loaf of bread with a dark brown crust and golden, porous sides. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible branding or packaging.
description_view_0: End view showing the rectangular profile, golden porous side, and the dark brown crust on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, golden, aerated body and the smooth, unscored dark brown crust.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, similar to view 0, showing the rectangular end and crust transition.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same golden, porous texture and dark crust.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is a continuous, dark brown layer with a slightly uneven edge where it meets the bread body. There are no visible scores, seeds, or flour dusting, and the surface is smooth and unadorned.
